title: Detect Outliers and Anomalies
description: Find unusual points and decide what to do with them.
content:
Help me handle outliers in: {{dataset}}

First, how to detect them appropriately for this data's distribution (a z-score assumes normality; IQR and others don't). Then the harder question: is each outlier an error to fix, a rare-but-real event to keep, or the very thing I should be studying? Decide per case, not blanket-drop. Show how the decision changes the conclusion, and insist I document what I removed and why so the analysis stays honest.
